name: Ninfa's Green Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped tomatoes, tomatillos, jalapenos, and garlic in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil (tomatoes provide all the liquid), then reduce heat and simmer for 10 to 15 minutes or until the tomatoes are soft. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
3. Peel, pit, and slice the avocados; set aside.
4. Place tomato mixture with part of the avocados (do this in batches) into a food processor along with cilantro and salt. Process until smooth.
5. Turn into a large bowl. Stir in sour cream, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate.
6. Serve with tortilla chips.
